attacking_style: Opportunistic breakaway rider who targets early moves rather than late attacks, showing willingness to survive in breaks for extended periods rather than launching decisive late accelerations.
team_tactics: Flexible role oscillating between full domestique sacrifice (extended pace-making on climbs/descents) and independent breakaway hunting when team leadership not required.
terrain_preference: Medium-mountain stages and single difficult climbs suit best; exposed and suffers badly on consecutive mountain stages in Grand Tours, particularly in final week.
vulnerability: Consecutive mountain stages destroy form - finished dead last on Stage 17 TDF 2023 after accumulated fatigue. Cannot sustain aggressive KOM point hunting when marked.
key_patterns: Breakaway specialist who survives long rather than attacks late, evident in Dauphiné and TDF appearances.
Reverts to defensive riding when marked, prioritizing survival over point collection (TDF 2022 KOM behavior).
Capable of surprise podium results in week-long stage races (Romandie 2nd) when fresh and unfocused upon.
Performs exemplary domestique work with extended pace-making sacrifices when team requires (Giro 2017 for Dumoulin).
form_trajectory: negative: 2023 TDF showed severe decline with dead-last finish on mountain stage, contrasting sharply with competitive 2022 breakaway presence
